mission.title: kubeedge: Upgrade to Kubernetes v1.15
mission.description:
**What type of PR is this?**
/kind feature

**What this PR does / why we need it**:

**Which issue(s) this PR fixes**:
Fixes #806 

**Special notes for your reviewer**:
@subpathdev is working together with me.
Thanks @subpathdev for the great work.
